rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al

rulings.Case Title: MAJED M MASSIS et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK LTD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 5, 2012, line 1. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Deny. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate liklihood of prevailing on the merits; doesn't cite a clear promise to support promissory estoppel cause of action wrongful foreclosure fails because Civil Code 2923.5 doesn't apply because property not owner occupied. Plaintiff doesn't demonstrate an unfair, unlawful or fraudulent business practice. Defendant merely exercises its rights under the deed of trust. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERWIN GONZALEZ VS. AURORA LOAN SERVICE, LL, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Aurora Loan Services Llc And Mortgage Elecrtronic Registration Systenms, Inc'S Re-Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 5, 2012, line 9. Defendants Aurora Loan Services Llc And Mortgage Elecrtronic Registration Systenms, Inc'S Re-Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to causes of actions 1,9, 13, 14, 15. sustained with leave to amend as to causes of actions 2,3,4,5,6,7,8,10,11,12. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAPITAL ONE NA VS. MIKAIL ABROMOV et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Set Aside Settlement Agreement And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 5, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ABRAMOV, MIKHAIL (SUED AS MIKAIL ABROMOV) Mtn To Set Aside Settlement Agreement Deny, Fails to meet 473b; Defendant was represented by counsel and agreement was approved by the Judge (Pro Tem). The terms are dates and monetary numbers without 1542 provision; no indication of need on request for interpreter. (501/REQ)
